name: linGetProtectedID
title: linGetProtectedID
description: With this function it is possible to calculate protected ID for the corresponding LIN frame identifier (i.e. the frame identifier with parity bits).

parameters.name: frameID
parameters.description: LIN frame identifier whose protected ID will be calculated.

return: Returns the calculated protected identifier or a value greater than 255 on failure.

description: Display in Write Window a protected ID for each LIN frame seen on the bus
